name: The Corner Office
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, convene a meeting: each opponent may pay {1}. For each opponent who doesn't, you draw a card and they are "noted as absent."
Creatures you control with a desk (a Bureaucrat, Clerk, Auditor, Notary, or Inspector) get +0/+2.
flavorText: It has a window. The window faces a wall. The wall is also hers.
